name: wechat-article-production-agent-version
description: Showrunner-first Codex plugin for turning completed Chinese podcast narration into WeChat Official Account article drafts through subagents, Markdown contracts, deterministic validation, and optional upload.

interface.shortDescription: 总控 + subagent + Markdown 契约生成公众号草稿
interface.longDescription: 将 wechat-article-pipeline 作为唯一入口。主 agent 负责沟通、分发、验收、总控脚本和上传；每篇文章由一个 subagent 交付 article_draft.md、image_candidates.md 和本地图片，JSON 仅由脚本生成。
defaultPrompt: 用 wechat-article-pipeline 把这个 narration.txt 做成公众号草稿
为这篇口播稿生成公众号文章并按 Markdown 契约配图
检查公众号文章包和 preflight 是否符合 agent-version 规则
